Portfolio.portfolioSubtitle: Track your portfolio performance and growth
Portfolio.insightDescription: You're performing better than 78% of InvestApp users.
Portfolio.upToDateInsight: Your portfolio is up to date on {percent}% of tracked repayments.
Portfolio.investmentsTracked: {count, plural, =0 {No investments tracked} =1 {# investment tracked} other {# investments tracked}}
Portfolio.noInvestmentsDescription: Once you fund a venture, your portfolio activity and performance will appear here.
Portfolio.loadInvestmentsError: Could not load your investments right now. Please try again in a moment.
Portfolio.publishVentureFirstDescription: Once your venture is active, this dashboard will show capital raised, financing metrics and investor summary.
Portfolio.publishFirstMobile: Publish your venture first and this dashboard will show your fundraising progress here.
Portfolio.investorsSupporting: {count, plural, =0 {No investors supporting this venture yet} =1 {# investor supporting this venture} other {# investors supporting this venture}}
Portfolio.noInvestors: No investors yet. Once funding starts, each investor will appear here with the next payment due date.
Portfolio.loadVentureDashboardError: Could not load your venture dashboard right now.
Portfolio.loadInvestorSummaryError: Could not load your investor summary right now.
Portfolio.loadPaymentScheduleError: Could not load your payment schedule right now.
Portfolio.loadingSubtitle: Preparing the right portfolio workspace for your profile.
Portfolio.publishVentureOrCredit: Publish your venture or credit request
Portfolio.publicationTiming: Publication starts automatically on the day you save it and remains active until the end date below.
Portfolio.statusPublished: Project published and now visible in the feed.
